hypothesis: Integrating 3D MOF structural information as an additional modality, via a cross-modal transformer that jointly attends to MOFid-based text and 3D graph representations, will yield statistically significant reductions in MAE on QMOF and hMOF predictions compared to the PMC+PubChem text-only pre-trained MOF LLM, with larger benefits in low-SFT-data regimes and for MOFs with complex topologies.
